howItWorks.intro: This mulch calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Volume
rules.explanation: Area times depth converted to cubic yards.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: 2-3 inches for most beds. Too deep can suffocate plant roots.
Bulk is cheaper for areas over 100 sq ft.
